headline: SMCI vs. AMD: Which AI Infrastructure Stock Has an Edge Right Now?
summary: Advanced Micro Devices emerges as the better AI infrastructure bet compared to Super Micro Computer as its GPUs power server ecosystems, backed by strong data center growth.
